canonicalCases.name: normalized strings, minimal escapes, and unordered input
keys are ordered by normalized UTF-8 bytes
control characters use the NCJ-1 minimal escapes
interoperable safe integer boundaries remain decimal integers

rejectedCases.name: floating point numbers are outside the protocol data model
exponent spellings are outside the protocol data model
negative zero is not a canonical integer
integers beyond the interoperable safe range are rejected
keys that collide after NFC normalization are rejected
duplicate object keys are rejected before canonicalization
